name: Levy Stay During Pending Offer or Agreement

eligibility.description: Requires the submission of a formal Offer-in-Compromise (Form 656) or Installment Agreement request (Form 9465).

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: The IRS cannot levy property while an Offer-in-Compromise or an Installment Agreement is pending, or for 30 days following a rejection.
